revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-235

Spherical divergence attenuation Inverse square law attenuation

Reduction in sound pressure level resulting from propagation of spherical waves in a free field without loss of energy.

{{IALAFooter}}
